paragraphs: Home » Concrete Pumps » Concrete Mixer Pump
The concrete mixer pump is an innovative construction machine that combines concrete mixing and pumping functions in one machine, completing the work of two machines in the past.

Concrete mixer with pump saves manpower and is more economical, allowing builders to complete concrete pouring tasks more quickly, and is very suitable for small and medium-sized projects such as house construction, road paving and tunnel construction.

The Daswell concrete mixer pump has high pumping capacity, stable performance and flexible mobility, providing a reliable solution for modern construction sites and has won a lot of praise from users.
Theoretical pumping capacity:30-45m³/h
Power:Diesel engine / Electric motor

The concrete mixer pump is a machine that combines the functions of a concrete mixer and a concrete pump into one machine, allowing concrete to be mixed at the construction site and then pumped to the desired location. The innovation of combining mixing and pumping in one simplifies the concrete production process, especially in cases of inconvenient transportation or small projects. The loader can easily feed sand, stone, cement, and other raw materials into the hopper. Compared with traditional concrete mixers and concrete mixer pumps, it is easier and faster to complete the work, more economical, and more practical. It is a new and improved equipment.

The mixer pump machine can discharge the mixed concrete directly into the integrated pumping hopper. And our high-performance concrete mixer hydraulic pumping system can deliver it exactly where needed. With Daswell concrete mixer pump equipment, you can save time, labor, and costs on your job site.

Choosing a reputable concrete mixer pump manufacturer is critical for your investment. Our proven systems combine reliability with industry-leading performance to keep your projects running smoothly. If you want to know more about Daswell machinery, you can send messages to our team.

Our concrete mixer pumps are engineered with advanced components for making sure high quality. These machines have unmatched reliability, efficiency, and durability. Here you can learn these advanced systems to know them better.
Main Oil Pump. We utilize premium imported options—Kawasaki (Korea) or Rexroth for superior hydraulic performance.
Diesel Engine. It is powered by a robust Weichai diesel engine. It can ensure consistent power delivery in demanding conditions.
Open-Loop Hydraulic System. It ensures smooth operation with minimal energy loss.
100μm Suction Oil Filter. This oil filter has high-precision filtration for protecting critical components.
Aerospace-Grade Cooler. It ensures optimal hydraulic oil temperature for peak efficiency.
Italy Manuli Oil Hoses. It is a premium hydraulic hose for leak-free performance.
Taiwan Yuken Hydraulic Valves. These hydraulic valves can control the system precisely for smooth operation.
China’s Number 1 Mixing Motor. This motor delivers powerful, consistent mixing performance.
Reinforced Mixing Blades and Shaft. Whether for the left/ or right half-shaft, hardness reaches HB250-280 for maximum wear resistance.
Brand Swing Cylinder and S-Valve. For these two parts, we use a precise design for smooth concrete flow.
Wear-Resistant Glass Plate and Cutting Ring. These are made from special alloy materials for extended service life.
Full Range of Pipes Included. It is compatible with various working conditions for seamless concrete placement.
450L Large Capacity. Maximizes batch efficiency.
Dual Hydraulic Motors. Utilizing this motor, it has a faster driving speed and 30% higher mixing efficiency than standard models.
Japan Omron Relays. It is the industry-leading system. That ensures reliability for electrical safety.
High-Quality Proximity Switches. It ensures accurate sensor performance.
250mm Thickened Drum Steel. It adopts an integrated design for superior structural stability.

When you invest in a concrete mixer with a pump, durability, efficiency, and long-term reliability are critical. At Daswell, we try our best to ensure our equipment delivers peak performance with minimal downtime.

Choosing the Daswell company, you can get cleaner hydraulic systems for fewer failures, strict pre-testing for reliable performance, power stability for consistent operation, robust pipes, and quick clamps for faster workflow. For durable, high-efficiency concrete pumping machines, you can trust Daswell’s engineering excellence.
Contact us now for learning more about Daswell machines and get the price list!

Choosing the right concrete mixer pump is crucial for maximizing efficiency and productivity on your construction site. For ensuring that you can choose the most suitable pump machines, here are some factors you should consider for your reference.

These factors are important when you are selecting a pumping machine. The higher capacity means faster project completion. The proper aggregate size can reduce clogging risks. Correct power sources mean lower fuel costs and better mobility. And the adequate pumping distance can ensure no delays in concrete placement. The optimal slump means smoother operation and better-quality pours.
Maximum concrete output(m³/h): 30-90Output pressure (MPa): 10-22
Max. concrete output: 50/80 m³/hPower Type: Diesel Engine
Theoretical pumping capacity: 40m³/hPower: Diesel engine

Before your purchasing, you should evaluate the specific needs of your projects to choose the most efficient and cost-effective concrete mixer pump equipment. You can also contact our sales team for professional suggestions. Daswell has different concrete pumps for you to choose.
At Daswell company, we provide complete solutions with professional technical and after-sale service. It can be sure that you will be satisfied at every stage.

Choosing Daswell as your concrete mixer pumps supplier, you can get technical expertise during the selecting. And we offer you reliable machine protection with warranty coverage. There are also local after-sales service network for quick support. From your order to operation, you can get professional services. Get in touch with Daswell team now!
Horizontal pumping distance is 200 meters, vertical pumping distance is 50 meters.
The mixer drum can produce about 20 cubic meters of concrete per hour. The pumping system can pump about 50 cubic meters of concrete per hour.
